Package com.irurueta.ar.sfm

Interface RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulatorListener

  • public interface RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulatorListener
    Listener to be notified of events such as when triangulation starts, ends or when progress changes.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onTriangulateEnd​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator)
      Called when triangulation ends.
      void onTriangulateNextIteration​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator, int iteration)
      Called when robust triangulator iterates to refine a possible solution.
      void onTriangulateProgressChange​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator, float progress)
      Called when estimation progress changes significantly.
      void onTriangulateStart​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator)
      Called when triangulation starts.

    • Method Detail

      • onTriangulateStart

        void onTriangulateStart​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator)
        Called when triangulation starts.
        Parameters:
        triangulator - reference to robust triangulator.

      • onTriangulateEnd

        void onTriangulateEnd​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator)
        Called when triangulation ends.
        Parameters:
        triangulator - reference to robust triangulator.

      • onTriangulateNextIteration

        void onTriangulateNextIteration​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator,
                                int iteration)
        Called when robust triangulator iterates to refine a possible solution.
        Parameters:
        triangulator - reference to robust triangulator.
        iteration - current iteration.

      • onTriangulateProgressChange

        void onTriangulateProgressChange​(RobustSinglePoint3DTriangulator triangulator,
                                 float progress)
        Called when estimation progress changes significantly.
        Parameters:
        triangulator - reference to robust triangulator.
        progress - progress of estimation expressed as a value between 0.0 and 1.0.
